data.name: AlphaFold / AlphaFold3
data.description: DeepMind's AI that predicts 3D protein structures from amino acid sequences. AlphaFold2 solved the 50-year protein folding problem; AlphaFold3 predicts protein-ligand, DNA, RNA interactions.
data.application: Drug design, enzyme engineering, understanding disease mutations

data.name: CRISPR-Cas13 (RNA Editing)
data.description: Targets RNA instead of DNA, enabling transient gene regulation without permanent genome changes. Safer for therapeutic use as effects are reversible.
data.application: Viral infection, RNA splicing disorders, transient gene knockdown
data.developer: Astellas (acquired Editas RNA program), Aera Therapeutics

data.name: Base Editing
data.description: Precise single-nucleotide changes without double-strand breaks. Converts C→T or A→G with minimal off-target effects. Verve Therapeutics using base editing to permanently lower cholesterol.
data.application: Point mutation diseases, cardiovascular risk reduction, sickle cell disease
data.developer: Beam Therapeutics, Verve Therapeutics, Prime Medicine

data.name: Prime Editing
data.description: Search-and-replace genome editing that can make any small edit (substitutions, insertions, deletions) without double-strand breaks or donor DNA templates.
data.developer: Prime Medicine (IPO 2022); David Liu lab (Broad Institute)

data.name: Spatial Transcriptomics
data.description: Measuring gene expression while preserving spatial location in tissue. Reveals cellular neighborhoods and tissue organization at unprecedented resolution.
data.application: Cancer microenvironment, brain cell atlas, developmental biology
